Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Standard Hire to Retire Typical steps Post job advertisement Screen candidates Conduct interviews Make hiring decision Onboard employee Add employee to payroll system Close case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 1 edges are Post to Screen Screen to Decide Screen to Interview Decide to Onboard Onboard to Payroll Payroll to Close

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The typical sequence expected is post job advertisement then screen candidates then conduct interviews then make hiring decision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In Model 1 the anomaly is that the Interview comes after Decide Normally you would not decide on hiring before interviews have been conducted

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: There is also an edge from Screen to both Decide and Interview so it suggests that after screening there is a possibility to decide before interviewing which does not fit the usual hiring logic

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 2 edges are Post to Screen Post to Interview Interview to Decide Decide to loop onboarding loop onboarding to xor payroll xor payroll to Close

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Model 2 has Interview before Decide which matches the core hiring logic better than Model 1

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: There is a direct edge from Post to Interview and no edge from Screen to Interview so interview may happen without screening being completed which is not typical

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The loop operator on onboarding is unusual because onboarding is normally a one time activity after a positive hiring decision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The exclusive choice operator for payroll means Payroll can be skipped but in a normal Hire to Retire process adding a hired employee to payroll should not be optional

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Model 1 has a more severe anomaly because it places Make Hiring Decision before Conduct Interviews which fundamentally violates the evaluation and selection logic of hiring

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Model 2 still contains deviations but it preserves the crucial idea that interviewing happens before the hiring decision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Therefore Model 2 more closely aligns with a normative Hire to Retire process even though it wrongly allows optional payroll and repeated onboarding and weakens the screening before interview dependency
